bpmn2:participant.name: Lung Cancer Patient Pathway Template for CCCNs

bpmn2:sequenceFlow.name: suspicion of secondary metastases OR recurrence
no, continue with thterapy according to treatment plan
no, end of end-of-life care/ best supportive care

bpmn2:startEvent.name: patient with histologically confirmed lung cancer

bpmn2:intermediateThrowEvent.name: citizen with positive lung cancer screening results

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: patients of the denominator presented in the pretherapeutic TB/MDT meeting
cp:qIDefinition.denumerator: all LC patients with first diagnosis of Lung Cancer

bpmn2:task.name: patient consultation after diagnosis with shared decision-making

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: patients of the denominator presented in the pretherapeutic TB/MDT meeting
cp:qIDefinition.denumerator: all LC patients with first diagnosis of Lung Cancer

cp:qualityIndicator.name: #18 clinical trials and research study access

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: Number of patients with lung cancer enrolled in an interventional clinical trial or translational research.

cp:qualityIndicator.name: #18 clinical trials and research study access

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: Number of patients with Lung Cancer enrolled in an interventional clinical trial or translational research.
Number of patients who receive curative treatment (radical radiotherapy, radical chemoradiotherapy or surgical resection) that have a cytological / histological diagnosis prior to treatment.
cp:qIDefinition.denumerator: All patients with Lung Cancer who receive curative treatment (radical radiotherapy, radical chemoradiotherapy or surgical resection). Excluding patients who refuse investigations.

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: Number of patients with a pathological diagnosis of NSCLC who have a tumour subtype identified.
cp:qIDefinition.denumerator: All patients with a pathological diagnosis of NSCLC.

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: Number of patients with Lung Cancer who have a pathological diagnosis (including following surgical resection).

cp:qualityIndicator.name: #1: percentage of patients having surgery for a NSCLC discussed in a postoperative TB/MDT meeting

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: patients of the denominator with discussion in a postoperative TB/MDT meeting
cp:qIDefinition.denumerator: all patients with NSCLC and surgery

bpmn2:task.name: supportive care/ early integration of palliative care

cp:qualityIndicator.name: #18 clinical trials and research study access

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: Number of patients with lung cancer enrolled in an interventional clinical trial or translational research.

bpmn2:intermediateCatchEvent.name: suspicion of secondary metastases OR recurrence
end of follow-up according to follow-up timeframes

bpmn2:startEvent.name: citizens with high risk for lung cancer

cp:qualityIndicator.name: #18 clinical trials and research study access

cp:qIDefinition.numerator: Number of patients with lung cancer enrolled in an interventional clinical trial or translational research.

bpmn2:textAnnotation.bpmn2:text: see separate subprocess for patient consultation
see separate subprocess for staging diagnostics
see seperate subprocess for MTB meeting
see seperate subprocess for standard TB meeting
* mandatory: post-operativ * MTB if necessary (see inclusion criteria in subprocess for MTB meeting); if necessary including staging diagnostics
in parallel to therapy; aim: maintain and improve quality of life; e.g., by pain management according to the WHO pain management scheme, psycho-oncological care
optional, according to national standards/ conditions
= exclusive, event-based gateway (when one of the following events happens, follow-up care is ending)
in reference to national/ international lung cancer guidelines
May be offered to well-informed heavy smokers aged 55–74 years within a dedicated programme in experienced CT centres (ESMO)
